activities_projects.title: Measuring Speed of Sound in Air
activities_projects.objective: Calculate speed of sound using echo method
steps: Measure distance from wall or cliff
Produce a sharp sound and measure time for echo to return
Calculate speed using v = 2 × distance / time
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands how speed of sound is measured

activities_projects.title: Comparing Sound in Different Media
activities_projects.objective: Measure relative speed of sound in air, water, and solids
steps: Strike tuning fork and observe sound through air, water, and solid
Measure time taken to reach listener if possible
Compare speed and intensity in different media
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyzes effect of medium on speed of sound

activities_projects.title: Frequency and Pitch Measurement
activities_projects.objective: Observe relation between frequency and pitch
steps: Strike different tuning forks or use app to produce tones
Record frequency and corresponding pitch
Compare how frequency affects pitch
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects pitch of sound with frequency

activities_projects.title: Measuring Amplitude and Loudness
activities_projects.objective: Understand relation between amplitude and loudness
steps: Produce sound of varying intensity using speaker or fork
Measure amplitude using app or relative observation
Record loudness and relate to amplitude
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyzes effect of amplitude on loudness

activities_projects.title: Observing Echo at Different Distances
steps: Measure echo time at multiple distances
Calculate speed of sound for each distance
Observe pattern and record findings
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands effect of distance on echo and sound travel

activities_projects.title: Resonance in Tubes
materials: Resonance tube or long open tube
steps: Strike tuning fork and place near tube partially filled with water
Adjust water level until sound is loudest (resonance)
Record tube length and calculate wavelength
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands resonance and wave behavior in air columns

activities_projects.title: Beat Formation
activities_projects.objective: Observe beats formed by two close frequencies
materials: Two tuning forks of slightly different frequencies
steps: Strike both tuning forks simultaneously
Listen for variation in loudness (beats)
Count number of beats per second and relate to frequency difference
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects beat frequency with difference in sound frequencies

activities_projects.title: Studying Reflection of Sound
steps: Produce sound near walls
Observe multiple echoes
Record times and analyze reflection path
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands multiple reflections and sound paths

activities_projects.title: Analyzing Frequency of Musical Instruments
steps: Play different musical instruments
Measure frequency using app
Compare pitch and relate to frequency
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands frequency range of musical sounds

activities_projects.title: Sound Absorption
activities_projects.objective: Observe effect of materials on sound intensity
steps: Produce sound near different materials (cloth, wood, metal)
Observe intensity of sound
Record which materials absorb sound more effectively
